zh.West Markham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt於1265年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓。他於1299年與Milicent de Beckering在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.West Markham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt于1265年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓。他于1299年与Milicent de Beckering在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt was born in 1265, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England. He married Milicent de Beckering in 1299, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1299, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt est né en 1265, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Milicent de Beckering en 1299, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1299, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt wurde 1265 in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren. Er hat 1299 in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Milicent de Beckering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1299 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt è nato il nel 1265 nel Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England. Lui sposato Milicent de Beckering nel 1299, nel Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1299, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.West Markham, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Ktは1265年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで生まれた。1299年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンでMilicent de Beckeringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt(은)는 1265년 영국 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 Milicent de Beckering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt nasceu em 1265, em Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Milicent de Beckering em 1299, em Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1299, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt родился в 1265 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Milicent de Beckering в 1299 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1299 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Bothumsell Kt nació en 1265, en Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Milicent de Beckering en 1299, en Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1299, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
